title: crunchy roasted British bulgur wheat Monsoon Tandoor Bulgur
description: A buttery and crunchy British dish, inspired by Monsoon cuisine, featuring bulgur wheat and a tandoor-inspired cooking method. Perfect for gluten-free diets.
instructions: Cook the bulgur wheat according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the ghee or oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onions and cook until they are lightly browned.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the pan and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the curry powder, ground cumin, ground coriander, and salt to the pan. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the cooked bulgur wheat to the pan and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the water to the pan and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a tandoor-inspired baking dish (such as a cast-iron skillet) and smooth the top.
Bake the mixture in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until it is crispy and golden brown on top.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
